briefdescription.para: This function demonstrates the usage of AXI FIFO It does the following:

para.verbatim: - Set up the output terminal if UART16550 is in the hardware build - Initialize the Axi FIFO Device. - Set up the interrupt handler for fifo - Transmit the data - Compare the data - Return the result

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance of the XLlFifo instance.
contains the base address of the device

simplesect.para: -XST_SUCCESS to indicate success -XST_FAILURE to indicate failure
In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration.

briefdescription.para: TxSend routine, It will send the requested amount of data at the specified addr.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance of the XLlFifo component.
is the address of the memory

simplesect.para: -XST_SUCCESS to indicate success -XST_FAILURE to indicate failure

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance of the XLlFifo component.
is the address where the FIFO stars writing

simplesect.para: -XST_SUCCESS to indicate success -XST_FAILURE to indicate failure

briefdescription.para: This is the interrupt handler for the fifo it checks for the type of interrupt and proceeds according to it.

parameterdescription.para: is a reference to the Fifo device instance.

briefdescription.para: This is the Receive handler callback function.

parameterdescription.para: is a reference to the Fifo device instance.

briefdescription.para: This is the Error handler callback function and this function increments the the error counter so that the main thread knows the number of errors.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to Instance of AXI FIFO device.
is a bitmask of the pending interrupts.

detaileddescription.para: This function is the main entry of the AXI FIFO interrupt test.

listitem.para:
XST_SUCCESS if tests pass
XST_FAILURE if fails.

briefdescription.para: This file demonstrates how to use the Streaming fifo driver on the xilinx AXI Streaming FIFO IP.The AXI4-Stream FIFO core allows memory mapped access to a AXI-Stream interface.

detaileddescription.para: The core can be used to interface to AXI Streaming IPs similar to the LogiCORE IP AXI Ethernet core, without having to use full DMA solution.

This is the interrupt example for the FIFO it assumes that at the h/w level FIFO is connected in loopback.In these we write known amount of data to the FIFO and wait for interrupts and after completely receiving the data compares it with the data transmitted.
Note: The TDEST Must be enabled in the H/W design inorder to get correct RDR value.

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes ----- ---- -------- ------------------------------------------------------- 3.00a adk 08/10/2013 initial release CR:727787 5.1 ms 01/23/17 Modified xil_printf statement in main function to ensure that "Successfully ran" and "Failed" strings are available in all examples. This is a fix for CR-965028. ms 04/05/17 Added tabspace for return statements in functions for proper documentation and Modified Comment lines to consider it as a documentation block while generating doxygen. 5.3 rsp 11/08/18 Modified TxSend to fill SourceBuffer with non-zero data otherwise the test can return a false positive because DestinationBuffer is initialized with zeros. In fact, fixing this exposed a bug in FifoRecvHandler and caused the test to start failing. According to the product guide (pg080) for the AXI4-Stream FIFO, the RDFO should be read before reading RLR. Reading RLR first will result in the RDFO being reset to zero and no data being received. 5.6 sd 07/7/23 Add system devicetree support. 6.1 vlt 12/18/25 Update Doxygen comments to include SDT flow details.
